overrides.override_summary: All initial fees deferred until franchisor completes pre-opening obligations and franchisee opens for business. Department determined franchisor not adequately capitalized.
overrides.why_it_matters: CA regulator found franchisor financially insufficient; fees cannot be collected upfront

overrides.override_summary: §31512 prohibits waiver of Franchise Investment Law rights; release provisions limited
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to sue under CA law despite general release requirements

overrides.override_summary: Wyoming choice of law may not be enforceable under CA law
overrides.why_it_matters: CA courts may apply CA law instead of WY law

overrides.override_summary: Liquidated damages clauses may be unenforceable per CA Civil Code §1671
overrides.why_it_matters: Termination damages provision may not hold up in CA

overrides.override_summary: Highest rate of interest allowed by CA law is 10% annually
overrides.why_it_matters: 18% annual late fee rate may be capped at 10% in CA

overrides.override_summary: No waiver of state franchise law claims via questionnaire/acknowledgment
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchise Investment Law protections preserved

overrides.override_summary: Illinois law governs (overrides Wyoming choice of law)
overrides.why_it_matters: Illinois franchisees benefit from IL franchise law protections

overrides.override_summary: Venue outside Illinois void per §4 of IL Franchise Disclosure Act (arbitration outside IL still permitted)
overrides.why_it_matters: Litigation (though not arbitration) must be in Illinois

overrides.override_summary: Per IL AG order based on financial condition: initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations completed and hotel opens
overrides.why_it_matters: IL AG independently found financial condition concerns

overrides.override_summary: Release does not apply to claims under MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law
overrides.why_it_matters: Franchisee retains right to sue under MD law on renewal/transfer despite release

overrides.override_summary: Termination upon bankruptcy may not be enforceable under federal bankruptcy law
overrides.why_it_matters: Automatic termination on insolvency may be limited

overrides.override_summary: MD Securities Commissioner required financial assurance; all initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations completed
overrides.why_it_matters: MD regulator required financial assurance due to franchisor's condition

overrides.override_summary: 90 days' notice of termination with 60 days to cure; 180 days' notice for non-renewal
overrides.why_it_matters: Substantially longer notice/cure periods than agreement provides

overrides.override_summary: Termination damages / liquidated damages / judgment notes may be unenforceable per MN Rule 2860.4400J
overrides.why_it_matters: Entire termination damages provision may be void in MN

overrides.override_summary: MN Stat §80C.21 prohibits requiring litigation outside MN
overrides.why_it_matters: Casper WY venue requirement may not apply to MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: Release not enforceable to extent prohibited by MN law
overrides.why_it_matters: MN franchise law claims preserved despite release

overrides.override_summary: Franchisor will protect franchisee's right to use trademarks and indemnify from claims per MN Stat §80C.12 Subd.1(g)
overrides.why_it_matters: Overrides general FDD position that franchisor has no obligation to protect franchisee's trademark rights

overrides.override_summary: MN Department of Commerce requires deferral of initial fees until hotel opens
overrides.why_it_matters: Upfront fee exposure eliminated for MN franchisees

overrides.override_summary: NY GBL Article 33 rights remain in force; non-waiver provisions of GBL §§687.4 and 687.5 apply
overrides.why_it_matters: NY franchisee protections cannot be waived

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee may terminate on any grounds available by law under NY GBL Article 33
overrides.why_it_matters: Broader termination rights than agreement provides

overrides.override_summary: Assignment only to assignee willing and financially able to assume obligations
overrides.why_it_matters: Limits franchisor's discretion on assignment approval

overrides.override_summary: Non-competes generally unenforceable in ND (enforced to max extent law allows)
overrides.why_it_matters: Not directly material here since no non-compete exists, but reinforces ND franchise-friendly posture

overrides.override_summary: Termination damages and liquidated damages may be unenforceable; enforcement cost provisions may be unenforceable per §51-19-09
overrides.why_it_matters: Termination damages and one-sided attorneys' fee provisions may be void

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration at mutually agreed site; ND claims may be brought in ND courts
overrides.why_it_matters: Casper WY arbitration venue overridden to mutual agreement

overrides.override_summary: Release not applicable to extent prohibited by ND Franchise Investment Law
overrides.why_it_matters: ND franchise law claims preserved

overrides.override_summary: Per ND Securities Commissioner order: initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations completed and hotel opens
overrides.why_it_matters: Upfront fee exposure eliminated

overrides.override_summary: §19-28.1-14: franchise agreement venue/jurisdiction restrictions void for RI Franchise Investment Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: RI franchisees can bring RI Act claims in RI courts

overrides.override_summary: RI law applies to RI Franchise Investment Act claims
overrides.why_it_matters: Wyoming choice of law overridden for RI franchise claims

overrides.override_summary: Per SD Securities Regulation Office order: all initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations completed and hotel opens
overrides.why_it_matters: Upfront fee exposure eliminated

overrides.override_summary: §13.1-564: unlawful to cancel franchise without reasonable cause; grounds that don't constitute reasonable cause may be unenforceable
overrides.why_it_matters: Some non-curable termination grounds may not hold up in VA

overrides.override_summary: WA Franchise Investment Protection Act prevails in conflict of laws
overrides.why_it_matters: WA law overrides Wyoming choice of law

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration in WA or mutually agreed location; litigation for WA Act claims may be brought in WA
overrides.why_it_matters: Casper WY venue overridden

overrides.override_summary: Release void except in negotiated post-agreement settlements with independent counsel per RCW 19.100.220(2)
overrides.why_it_matters: Standard release on renewal/transfer is void in WA

overrides.override_summary: RCW 19.100.190 permits treble damages; punitive damage waivers may be void
overrides.why_it_matters: Punitive damages waiver unenforceable; treble damages available under WA Act

overrides.override_summary: Transfer fees collectable only to extent reflecting reasonable estimated/actual costs
overrides.why_it_matters: Any transfer fee must be cost-based

overrides.override_summary: Non-compete void against employees earning <$100K/yr or contractors earning <$250K/yr per RCW 49.62.020; non-solicitation of franchisee employees prohibited per RCW 49.62.060
overrides.why_it_matters: Not directly material (no non-compete exists) but non-solicitation prohibition is significant

overrides.override_summary: Franchisee has no obligation to indemnify for losses caused by indemnified party's negligence, willful misconduct, strict liability, or fraud
overrides.why_it_matters: Materially limits indemnification obligation — franchisor cannot be indemnified for its own wrongdoing

overrides.override_summary: Per WA DFI Director order: initial fees deferred until pre-opening obligations completed and hotel opens
overrides.why_it_matters: Upfront fee exposure eliminated

overrides.override_summary: Termination only for good cause (failure to comply + 30-day cure); renewal refusal requires fair market value compensation under certain conditions
overrides.why_it_matters: Higher bar for termination; FMV buyback rights in some scenarios

overrides.override_summary: Arbitration or litigation outside MI prohibited (preempted by Federal Arbitration Act for arbitration)
overrides.why_it_matters: Court litigation must be in MI; arbitration provision enforced per FAA

overrides.override_summary: Refusal to permit transfer only for good cause (enumerated grounds)
overrides.why_it_matters: Transfer approval discretion limited to good cause
